heroSub: BWJ-ART, an Autistic Danish artist working with spray paint, acrylic, paper, and sculpturing. What started as anxiety management has become self expression.
statementQuote: The message I try to send does not have to be the one perceived, as long as it makes you think the work is successful. — BWJ
processIntro: No formula. Just a rhythm that starts with a feeling and ends on canvas.

processSteps.title: Feel
processSteps.text: Music, anxiety, restlessness, and the everyday feelings of youth supply the first spark.

processSteps.title: Sketch
processSteps.text: Fine liners, pencil, and quick studies work out the shape of a new composition.

processSteps.title: Layer
processSteps.text: Spray paint, acrylic, wire, and posca marker are built up across canvas, Masonite, and paper.

processSteps.title: Let It Go
processSteps.text: The message doesn't have to land the way it was meant to. Art is too personal for that.
